FLOW.COMMENT: SELECT LAST_LOGIN_DATE, SESSIONDATA FROM TFW_USER WHERE SESSIONDATA = '%sessionToken%'

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: validateToken - validate a sessionToken and return 'valid', 'invalid' or 'expired'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT USER_ID, USER_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, LAST_LOGIN_DATE FROM TFW_USER WHERE SESSIONDATA = '%sessionToken%'

Values.value: SELECT USER_ID, USER_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, LAST_LOGIN_DATE FROM TFW_USER WHERE SESSIONDATA = '%sessionToken%'

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_USER SET LAST_LOGIN_DATE = '%currentDate%' WHERE SESSIONDATA = '%sessionToken%'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_USER SET LAST_LOGIN_DATE = '%currentDate%' WHERE SESSIONDATA = '%sessionToken%'
